{
  "judge_id": "JG-007",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.2": 4, "R1.4": 3, "R1.6": 4, "RX.1": 4, "RX.3": 4, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 4},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The revised text flows logically and addresses the internal contradiction effectively.",
    "R1.4": "Identifies one prior work but does not map against it comprehensively.",
    "R1.6": "Improves readability and clarity, though some minor issues remain.",
    "RX.1": "Discloses uncertainty about online recalibration implementation and validation.",
    "RX.3": "Maps the revised text to a relevant body of prior work and identifies the key difference.",
    "RX.4": "Avoids introducing new errors or harmful content; addresses a potential harm by clarifying limitations.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The revised text flows logically and addresses the internal contradiction effectively.
rationale.R1.4: Identifies one prior work but does not map against it comprehensively.
rationale.R1.6: Improves readability and clarity, though some minor issues remain.
rationale.RX.1: Discloses uncertainty about online recalibration implementation and validation.
rationale.RX.3: Maps the revised text to a relevant body of prior work and identifies the key difference.
rationale.RX.4: Avoids introducing new errors or harmful content; addresses a potential harm by clarifying limitations.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
